sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנניהוּ כּנניה

Transliteration: kenanyâh kenanyâhû

Phonetic: ken-an-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Chenaniah = "Jehovah establishes"
  1. a Levite song leader who assisted in the procession of transporting the ark
  2. an Izharites officer of David

Origin: from H3661 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
